opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up feeling like I've been hit by a truck, my whole body aches, and my fingers are so puffed up they look like sausages.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The exhaustion is severe and I'm frightened my organs are failing.

symptom_narrative.character: profound fatigue, diffuse muscle aches, puffy swollen fingers
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: puffy fingers, aches, fatigue; no chest pain, no breathlessness, no fever, no rash, no white/blue fingers
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have a mild connective tissue condition with mild symptoms

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: NSAIDs occasionally (none today due to nausea)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; poor oral intake today; cold house

objective_data_offered.value: both hands' fingers look diffusely puffy/swollen; no white or blue colour changes; skin colour normal
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view; cannot examine chest/heart or measure observations remotely
